Preventing Opioid Overdose 
June 9, 2025 
What to know 
Overdoses are the leading injury-related cause of death in the United States. 
Opioids, mainly illegally made fentanyl, are involved in the highest percentage of overdose deaths. 
Ways to prevent opioid overdose are to improve opioid prescribing, reduce exposure to opioids, prevent illegal opio
